content: GPU non-determinism stems from non-associative FP + atomic accumulation whose order depends on thread timing. Determinism achieved by: disabling FP atomics, fixed canonical binary-tree (warp-synchronous) reductions with identical order across runs, explicit ordered accumulation in shared mem/registers. Cost is real but can retain 95-98% throughput on Hopper. For integer histogram counts atomics are associative (deterministic); only FP gain/criterion sums need ordered reduction.
